prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科组最低位次分别为约 1071→1714→2761→529→408 名。2021–2023 年（理科）位次持续后移，2024 年起改为物理类后位次大幅前移至 529 名，2025 年进一步前移至 408 名，近两年竞争明显加剧；该校在甘肃省理科组招生计划波动较大：2021 年 25 人，2022–2023 年 47 人，2024 年（物理类）15 人，2025 年（物理类）仅 7 人；2026 年计划大幅扩至 39 人，较 2025 年增加约 457%，扩招幅度极大，将显著拉低录取门槛，位次数字预计大幅后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京理工大学为 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2026 年位列第 14 名（Top20），学校层次顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强；2026 年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，涉及师德师风及学校管理舆情，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第 47 位（较热），整体关注度中等偏上；拥有 12 个 A- 及以上学科，其中信息与通信工程、控制科学与工程为 A+，计算机科学与技术、机械工程、材料科学与工程为 A，光学工程、管理科学与工程为 A，学科实力雄厚，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与北理工工科试验班高度契合；甘肃省 2026 年考生总数约 21.87 万，较 2025 年（约 17.98 万）增长约 21.6%，物理类考生估算约 14.76 万，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 408 名、2026 年招生计划大幅扩招（7→39 人）、本省考生总数增长约 21.6% 以及学校声誉偏负面等因素，扩招对位次后移的拉动作用远超考生增加和声誉抑制的抵消效应，预计 2026 年最低位次将大幅后移至约 1577 名，区间 1397–1757 名。

一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（拔尖计划/徐特立英才班/未来精工技术/卓越班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与智能车辆菁英班）
- 工科试验班（航空航天与机电类）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026 年物理类大幅扩招，预测位次区间 1397–1757 名，较 2025 年大幅后移。位次在区间内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<1397 名）可重点冲一档王牌专业（拔尖计划/徐特立英才班等）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were approximately 1071→1714→2761→529→408. From 2021 to 2023 (science), rankings continued to decline. Starting in 2024, after switching to the physics category, rankings significantly improved to 529, and further to 408 in 2025, indicating intensified competition in recent years. The enrollment plan for the science group in Gansu Province fluctuated greatly: 25 in 2021, 47 in 2022–2023, 15 in 2024 (physics category), and only 7 in 2025 (physics category). In 2026, the plan expands significantly to 39, an increase of about 457% compared to 2025, which will notably lower the admission threshold, and the ranking number is expected to drop significantly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising, reaching 14th (Top 20) in 2026. The university is top-tier, strongly attracting high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation is somewhat negative, involving incidents related to teacher ethics and school management, which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 47th (relatively hot), with overall attention above average. It has 12 A- or above disciplines, including Information and Communication Engineering and Control Science and Engineering as A+, Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and Materials Science and Engineering as A, and Optical Engineering and Management Science and Engineering as A, demonstrating strong academic strength highly aligned with its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely matching BIT's engineering experimental classes. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Gansu Province is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (about 179,800). The estimated number of physics category examinees is about 147,600, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 408, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (7→39), the approximately 21.6% increase in the total number of examinees in the province, and the somewhat negative reputation of the university, the pulling effect of expansion on ranking decline far outweighs the offsetting effects of increased examinees and reputation suppression. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will drop significantly to about 1577, with a range of 1397–1757.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Talent Program/Xu Teli Elite Class/Future Precision Engineering Technology/Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Manufacturing and Intelligent Vehicle Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Mechanical-Electrical Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Science and Materials Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the physics category sees significant expansion, with a predicted ranking range of 1397–1757, a substantial drop from 2025. For rankings within this range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<1397), prioritize aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (Top Talent Program/Xu Teli Elite Class, etc.).

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 409 名、2026 年招生计划小幅扩招（21→23 人）、本省历史类考生增长约 21.8% 以及学校声誉偏负面等因素，考生增加对位次后移的拉动略大于扩招的缓解作用，预计 2026 年最低位次小幅后移至约 452 名，区间 401–503 名。

学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 14th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, indicating a top-tier level.
